articles.title: China Fires Missile from Submarine into the Pacific, Raising Concern Across the Region
articles.summary: China recently carried out a test by launching a ballistic missile from one of its submarines into the Pacific Ocean. A ballistic missile is a powerful rocket that can travel very long distances. Several countries in the Asia-Pacific region expressed concern after the test took place. Ballistic missiles launched from submarines are considered especially difficult to detect and track, making them a sensitive issue in international relations. Nations nearby are watching the situation closely, as events like this can affect feelings of safety and stability across the whole region.

lv1: What did China launch from a submarine during this test? (中國在今次測試中從潛艇發射了什麼？)
Which ocean did the missile land in? (導彈落入了哪個海洋？)
lv2: Why might other countries in the Asia-Pacific region feel worried about China testing a submarine-launched ballistic missile? (為什麼亞太地區的其他國家可能會對中國測試潛射彈道導彈感到擔憂？)
What makes a missile fired from a submarine more difficult to deal with compared to one fired from land? (從潛艇發射的導彈與從陸地發射的相比，為何更難應對？)
lv3: Should countries have the right to test military weapons in international waters? What are the arguments for and against this? (國家是否有權在國際水域測試軍事武器？這樣做有什麼支持和反對的論點？)
How should smaller nations in Asia respond when a larger neighbour conducts military tests that make them feel unsafe? (當亞洲較小的國家因鄰近大國進行軍事測試而感到不安全時，應如何回應？)

articles.title: Scientists Develop a New Daily Pill That May Help People Manage Their Weight
articles.summary: Researchers have found that a new pill taken once a day, called orforglipron, helped people lose more weight and improve their blood sugar levels better than the leading medicine currently used in tablet form. Unlike injection-based weight medicines that many patients find uncomfortable, this new pill can simply be swallowed. The results came from a large clinical trial, which is a carefully controlled study involving many people. If approved by health authorities, this drug could become an easier option for patients managing obesity or type 2 diabetes around the world, including in Asia where these conditions are growing.

lv1: What is the name of the new weight-loss pill mentioned in the article? (文章提到的新型減重藥片叫什麼名字？)
How often does a patient need to take this new pill? (病人需要多久服用一次這種新藥片？)
lv2: Why might a daily pill be a better choice for some patients compared to an injection? (為什麼每日服用的藥片對某些病人來說可能比注射更好？)
What is a clinical trial, and why is it important before a new medicine can be used by the public? (什麼是臨床試驗，為什麼新藥在公眾使用前必須進行臨床試驗？)
lv3: Some people believe obesity should be treated mainly through lifestyle changes like diet and exercise, while others support using medicines. Which approach do you think is better, and why? (有人認為肥胖症應主要透過改變生活方式如飲食和運動來治療，有人則支持使用藥物。你認為哪種方法更好？為什麼？)
If a highly effective weight-loss drug becomes widely available, could it have any negative effects on society or on how people think about their bodies? (如果一種非常有效的減重藥物廣泛普及，它會對社會或人們對身體的看法產生負面影響嗎？)

articles.sourceUrl: https://www.stheadline.com/hongkong-news/3527841/全港大專生機械人大賽2026-港大奪冠
articles.title: 全港大專生機械人大賽2026圓滿結束　香港大學隊伍勇奪冠軍
articles.summary: 香港科技園公司主辦的「全港大專生機械人大賽2026」近日順利完成。今屆賽事以中國傳統武術「武林至尊」為主題，全港九間大專院校共派出十五支隊伍、逾三百名學生參賽，競爭激烈。最終，香港大學的「格物」團隊憑藉精湛的技術和團隊合作，於決賽中脫穎而出，成功奪得冠軍寶座。是次比賽不僅展現了年輕人的創科實力，更體現了堅持不懈的精神。

lv1: 今屆機械人大賽由哪間學校的隊伍奪得冠軍？
今屆大賽共有多少名學生參賽？
lv2: 為什麼今屆機械人大賽選用「武林至尊」作為主題？這個主題對比賽有何意義？
參加機械人比賽對大專學生有什麼學習上的益處？
lv3: 香港應如何在學校課程中加強對創科教育的重視，以培養更多科技人才？
機械人技術日益普及，這對未來的就業市場有何影響？社會應如何為年輕人做好準備？

articles.sourceUrl: https://www.stheadline.com/hongkong-news/3527654/國泰航班羅馬尼亞上空失聯北約派戰機升空
articles.title: 國泰港倫航班在歐洲上空曾失聯　北約戰機緊急升空警告
articles.summary: 國泰航空一班由香港飛往英國倫敦的客機，上周六飛越東歐羅馬尼亞上空時，一度與地面控制塔失去無線電聯繫。事件觸發北約的緊急警報機制，鄰近的匈牙利空軍隨即派出戰機升空，以目視方式向涉事客機發出警告。客機在收到警告後迅速恢復聯繫，戰機其後返回基地。國泰航空表示，涉事航班全程沿用經官方批准的航道飛行。今次事件反映航空通訊對飛行安全的重要性。

lv1: 國泰這班航機是從哪裏飛往哪裏？
哪個組織派出戰機升空處理今次事件？
lv2: 為什麼飛機與地面控制塔失去聯繫會被視為嚴重事件？
北約的「快速反應警報機制」是什麼？它在今次事件中發揮了什麼作用？
lv3: 航空公司與軍事組織在處理飛行安全事故時，各自的責任應如何界定？
科技進步是否能完全消除飛行中的通訊故障風險？若不能，社會應如何應對這類突發事故？
